case_title: PARKMERCED COMPANY, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP vs. LITVINOVA, MARIANNA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED COMPANY, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT LITVINOVA, MARIANNA DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER & ORDER POSTING AND MAILING SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED COMPANY, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED COMPANY, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LITVINOVA, MARIANNA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 750 GONZALEZ #3C $1,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EVICTION AFTER JUNE 30 1993 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: WRIGHT, THOMAS PAUL SUBSTITUTED FOR MARGULIES, JEFFREY EVAN AS ATTORNEY FOR PARKMERCED COMPANY, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP
ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT TO CALIFORNIA COLLECTION CENTER,FILED BY PLAINTIFF
